tagline: Now generally available for streamlined data pipeline management.
what_it_does: Lakeflow Declarative Pipelines allows users to define end-to-end data pipelines using SQL or Python, focusing on the desired transformations while the runtime handles orchestration, incremental processing, checkpointing, and recovery. This release introduces serverless compute for automatic scaling during pipeline execution, native change data capture (CDC) for ingesting data from operational databases, data quality expectations with quarantine and alerting for failed rows, and governance through Unity Catalog for all pipeline tables and lineage.
why_it_matters: This update enhances data pipeline management by simplifying the development process and improving operational efficiency through automatic scaling and robust data governance. Businesses can benefit from reduced operational overhead, improved data quality, and the ability to quickly adapt to changing data sources, ultimately leading to faster insights and decision-making.
plain_summary: Lakeflow Declarative Pipelines allows users to define end to end data pipelines using SQL or Python, focusing on the desired transformations while the runtime handles orchestration, incremental processing, checkpointing, and recovery. This release introduces…

capabilities.title: Serverless Compute
capabilities.desc: Enables automatic scaling for pipeline execution without manual intervention.

capabilities.title: Native CDC Ingestion
capabilities.desc: Facilitates seamless ingestion of change data from operational databases.

capabilities.title: Data Quality Management
capabilities.desc: Provides quarantine and alerting mechanisms for failed data rows.

capabilities.title: Unity Catalog Integration
capabilities.desc: Ensures governance and lineage tracking for all pipeline tables.

prerequisites: A workspace enabled for Unity Catalog.
A region that supports serverless compute.
Appropriate permissions to create pipelines and target schemas.
limitations: Continuous mode is not yet supported for all sink types.
Pipelines authored in the legacy DLT UI must be migrated to the new editor.

steps.title: Enable Serverless
steps.desc: Activate serverless compute in your Databricks account.

steps.title: Create Pipeline
steps.desc: Initiate a new pipeline using the Lakeflow editor.

steps.title: Define Tables
steps.desc: Specify the tables involved in your pipeline.

steps.title: Run Pipeline
steps.desc: Execute the pipeline to process data.

key_takeaway: Lakeflow Declarative Pipelines now offers a robust, serverless solution for building and managing data pipelines efficiently.
